title: Protea levisanus
taxonomy: Protea levisanus is a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. It belongs to the genus Protea and is native to South Africa. The classification of Protea levisanus is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the class Magnoliopsida. Within the class Magnoliopsida, it falls under the subclass Rosidae. The order and family classification for Protea levisanus are Proteales and Proteaceae respectively.
